en.name: Chinese Chess
en.desc: Xiangqi - the ancient Chinese strategy game! Each piece has unique movement rules. Capture the general to win. A cultural treasure for 2000+ years!
en.howToPlay: Click a piece to select it, then click a valid square to move. Pieces include General, Advisors, Elephants, Horses, Chariots, Cannons, and Soldiers.
tips: The General cannot leave the palace
Cannons need a screen piece to capture
Horses can be blocked by adjacent pieces

zh.name: 中国象棋
zh.desc: 中国古老的策略游戏！每枚棋子都有独特的移动规则。将死对方主帅获胜。传承2000多年的文化瑰宝！
zh.howToPlay: 点击棋子选择它，然后点击有效位置移动。棋子包括将/帅、士、象、马、车、炮和兵/卒。
tips: 马可以被相邻的棋子蹩脚
